description: Declarative registry entry for a non-persona orchestration service that Oscar may use for bounded administrative work.
rules: Service declarations are registry metadata, not personas.
Read-only service declarations must have an empty allowedWriteScopes list.
Bounded-write service declarations must name the broadest service-owned scopes; service packets narrow those scopes to exact allowedWrites for each execution.
The declaration file name must be <id>.json.
Execution guidance may name a model class, but Oscar retains decision authority and packets retain exact write authority.
